what_they_want_from_strangers: Useful clarity, respect for Ward Notary, and proof that strangers will not create avoidable noise in Principality of Shelk.
what_they_refuse: Thalen Petalglass refuses careless disrespect, vague promises, and demands that threaten standing or workload.

how_they_can_help: Thalen Petalglass can open doors, explain local expectations, or redirect trouble before it reaches a harder authority layer.
